sections.title: Cross-lane synthesis
sections.summaryTitle: UI-003B changes the preview from shell-only to lane-dense
sections.summary: The shell now shows purpose-built preview surfaces for triage, scheduling, tracking, automation proposals, extensions, receipts, Ibal, and provider gates.
changes: No provider data or runtime action was introduced.
Each lane has a primary structure and secondary/detail group.
Right inspector copy follows the active lane.
UI-003C remains reserved for Inbox-specific refinement.

inspector.context: Ibal is presented as a first-class conductor lane and contextual proposal source.
inspector.evidence: Ibal evidence is cross-lane fixture state, TODO state, and blocker references only.
inspector.egressState: Ibal proposals cannot execute actions. It cannot send, connect providers, mutate repositories, or enable automations.
inspector.ibalProposal: Next proposed slice after UI-003B is UI-003C: Inbox lane only.
inspector.receipts: Ibal points to receipts but does not create confirmed runtime receipts in this static preview.
